ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Dec-12-2025 Off Calendar

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Oct-17-2025 Continued To Dec-12-25 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter is on calendar for Judgment Creditor Malanda, Inc., DBA Mandell's Clinical Pharmacy request for an Order of Examination as to Judgment Debtor Danielle Lane M.D.

Judge Daniel Flores; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter not reported.

Judgment Creditor Malanda, Inc. DBA Mandell's Clinical Pharmacy is present represented by Steven Alfred Booska
Judgment Debtor Danielle Lane M.D. is present

The court is made aware a Media Request by NBC Bay Area to photograph, record, or broadcast this order of examination. The request was denied by Judge Tong on the October 16, 2025 order.

Michael Botti of NBC Bay Area appeared at the examination and requested to observe. If the media is present, Dr. Lane declined to participate in the examination without presense of her counsel.

This matter is continued to December 12, 2025 at 9:00am in dept. 505 for further examination with Dr. Lane's attorney present. Dr. Lane is ordered back on December 12, 2025.

Motion And Notice Of Hearing To Amend Defendants Names In Sister State Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-12-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF MALANDA, INC., DBA MANDELL'S CLINICAL PHARMACY's Motion To Amend Defendants Names In Sister State Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion to amend the sister state judgment entered in this action is granted. Judgment Debtor Lane Fertility Procedure Center, LLC shall be amended to be named as Lane Fertility Procedure Center, LLC, a Limited Liability Company; and Judgment Debtor Lane Fertility Institute for Education and Research, Inc. shall be amended to be named as Lane Fertility Institute for Education and Research, Inc., a Corporation.

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Aug-06-2025 Continued For Letter To Oct-17-25 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for an Order of Examination of Judgment Deptor Danielle Lane M.D.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Matter not reported.

Judgment Creditor Malanda Inc. is present represented by Steven Booska.
Judgment Debptor Danielle Lane, M.D. is not present.

A valid proof of service is on file for this matter.

At Mr. Booska's request, this matter is continued to October 17, 2025 at 11:00am in dept. 505 and a bench letter is issued. Bench letter is mailed both parties.
